data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: YouTube encrypts data both in transit and at rest to protect user data and content.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes TLS for data in transit and AES-256 for data at rest.

data.title: Authentication Mechanisms
data.description: Robust authentication mechanisms to prevent unauthorized access to user accounts.

data.title: Threat Detection Systems
data.description: Advanced threat detection systems to monitor and mitigate potential attacks.
data.technical_spec: Machine learning algorithms for anomaly detection and automated response.

data.title: DDoS Protection
data.description: Protection against distributed denial-of-service attacks to maintain service availability.
data.technical_spec: Scaling of resources and traffic filtering measures.

data.title: Content Moderation AI
data.description: AI-powered systems for detecting and removing harmful or inappropriate content.
data.technical_spec: Deep learning models trained on vast datasets for content recognition.
